tagline: Track every ASX dividend, calculate grossed-up yields, and see your SMSF franking credit refund — one-time purchase
target_customer: Self-directed ASX investors managing their own dividend portfolio, SMSF trustees who want to understand their annual franking credit refund, and retirees building a passive income stream from Australian shares — particularly anyone tired of paying for a subscription just to track dividends
features: Portfolio Holdings & Dividend Tracker — enter up to 30+ ASX ticker holdings with auto-calculated market value, dividend income, grossed-up yield, and ex-dividend/payment date tracking

Franking Credit Grossed-Up Yield Calculator — enter any ASX stock price, DPS, and franking % to instantly see cash yield, grossed-up yield, franking credit per share, and after-tax yield with support for both 30% and 25% tax rates

SMSF Tax Year Summary — full dividend register for FY2025/26 with auto-calculated franking credits received, tax payable at fund rate (15% or 0%), and the exact franking credit refund amount the ATO owes your SMSF
why_chosen: The listing copy was already fully written and product spec was complete — zero remaining research or marketing strategy required. It has virtually no competition in the ASX-specific niche, requires no infrastructure or subscription overhead, and addresses a clear, under-served pain point: Australian dividend investors collect up to 43% more yield when franking credits are accounted for, yet most have no structured way to calculate this. With 700,000+ active ASX retail investors and a $29 price point, a single Whirlpool forum post can generate first revenue. Conservative 30-day forecast is $290–$580 (10–20 sales); realistic 90-day forecast is $870–$2,900.
